Mon: Hey!
Speaker 2: Hey, how'd it go?
Mon: Oh my God, it was the best funeral ever! I mean, everyone loved the food, and guess what? I even got another funeral for tomorrow--the dead-guy-from-today's best friend. I mean, it is like I am the official caterer for that accident!
Speaker 3: Mon! I'm so happy for you!
Mon: Thanks. Like, check out my new catering stuff.  Look at this! I'm an omelet station! Omelet? Made to order!
Speaker 3: I'll have one, please. Plus my money.
